images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, early‑twenties Japanese idol‑style model, her flawless yet realistic skin showing fine pores and a gentle vellus‑hair glow, large expressive almond‑shaped eyes, a cute yet subtly seductive smile, and a sleek, waist‑length cascade of straight black silk hair, captured in a bright, crisp flash‑lit studio setting reminiscent of high‑end Instagram fashion photography. She wears a playful nurse‑inspired outfit: a form‑fitting French floral sundress in pastel pink and micro‑dot patterns, the delicate silk‑blend fabric hugging her slim waist and ample curves, a tiny white nurse’s cap perched on her crown, a slim stethoscope dangling playfully from one shoulder, and a pair of glossy black kitten heels that elongate her legs. The scene is set on a rumpled, plush bed with scattered vintage‑patterned pillows, the linens in soft mint and cream tones adding a nostalgic, homely vibe. Lighting is a powerful on‑camera flash with a large softbox directly in front, delivering a clean, evenly illuminated, professional look with virtually no heavy shadows—just subtle, pleasing highlights on the dress’s lace trim and the gentle sheen of her skin. The background is softly blurred with a creamy bokeh of warm tungsten and pastel glows, suggesting a stylish Tokyo loft bathed in golden hour light filtered through sheer curtains. She laughs naturally, eyes sparkling as she playfully tilts her head toward the camera, a genuine, exuberant mid‑laugh captured at eye level, her posture relaxed yet poised, as if interacting with her adoring fans. Color grading is a pastel‑soft, vintage‑nude palette, with lifted highlights, muted shadows, and a faint rose‑gold tint that enhances the youthful, nostalgic mood. Shot on a Sony A7R IV, 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, ray‑tracing realism, global illumination for lifelike light falloff.8k photo, Large breasts

A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese idol‑style model, flawless yet realistic skin with visible pores and faint vellus hair, large expressive eyes, a cute yet seductive face, fit and curvy figure with a slim waist and ample chest, straight silky black hair spilling over her shoulders. She is dressed in a form‑fitting ivory chunky knit sweater, ribbed and slightly sheer, hugging her bust and exposing the curve of her ribs, paired with a high‑waisted black satin mini‑skirt that clings to her hips. Standing before an illuminated wooden carousel in a high‑end Tokyo promenade, the pastel neon lights spin around her, the background blurred into soft bokeh. A monitor on a nearby desk casts a clean blue‑screen glow across her face, eye‑level composition, she bites her lower lip subtly. The scene feels ethereal and angelic, high‑contrast, sharp. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
